summary: STEP 0R.4(a) lake build returned exit 1. Build red. No code edit made. iter-13 stash not popped (preserved at stash@{0}).

primary_failure.diagnosis: Mathlib v4.30.0-rc1 has restructured the Asymptotics namespace. The pinned cache directory lean/.lake/packages/mathlib/Mathlib/Analysis/Asymptotics/ contains AsymptoticEquivalent.lean / Completion.lean / Defs.lean / ExpGrowth.lean / Lemmas.lean / LinearGrowth.lean / SpecificAsymptotics.lean / SuperpolynomialDecay.lean / Theta.lean / TVS.lean -- but no top-level Asymptotics.lean file. WallisFamily.lean L3 needs to be replaced by an updated import (likely Mathlib.Analysis.Asymptotics.Defs and/or .Theta) -- this is iter-13 territory.

lake_test_observation: lake test exit 1; warning 'manifest out of date: git revision of dependency mathlib changed; use `lake update mathlib` to update it' AND error 'wallis-formal-verification: no test driver configured'. Recorded as NO_TEST_DRIVER (auxiliary observation; build red is the binding halt).

Operator should: (1) first land an iter-14-class build-graph repair (apply iter-13 stash content selectively or pop+re-pass), getting `lake build` green WITHOUT touching Thm66_ApparentSingularity.lean; (2) then re-fire slot 148R as 148R2 over a clean+green substrate. operator_action_required: decide repair lane (iter-14 build-graph repair vs targeted import-substitute fire) and re-issue slot 148R2 wrapper after substrate green
